3236060.name: Creepy Crawling
3236060.description:
CONTENT WARNING: CONTAINS IMAGES OF LARGE SPIDERS

Our protagonist has awakened in what it seems to be a hospital, and cannot remember anything that happened the day before. He needs to find a way out by discovering what it's lurking in the shadows.

Detailed Description of Content

Solve puzzles to unlock key equipment to escape the hospital.

Navigate a hospital environment by unlocking doors and finding secret passageways. 

Once you find the handgun, use it to defend yourself against the giant arachnids.

Content

The primary enemies of the game are spiders and is not suitable for people with severe arachnophobia.

There are no explicit references to sex, violence, or drugs.

This game contains jump scares.
